summary: 12/12 changes merged (goal MET, scope expanded via user-directed analyze). Harness scorecard: claude 8/8, codex 2/2, opencode 0/2 (sandbox friction, both reassigned to claude). 5 real defects caught by independent re-verification incl. a panic=abort FFI bug and a self-caught layering violation. Key lesson: multi-lane edits to one scaffold file need frozen trait seams + delegated integration, not blind git-merge. Recommended next phase: phase-codegen-and-ci-verification (CI wiring, PEM publish unblock, real codegen pass).
